creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 157399
Poudriere testport build logs from 10.1-RELEASE amd64

PR submitter is maintainer.  Presumably maintainer-feedback+.

PR is stale but no build issues noted just now in Poudriere so 'needs-qa' looks good in that regard.  This is a easy close on an old PR.

Poudriere 'testport' build tested on the following releases (info from `poudriere jail -l`)
8.4-RELEASE-p28      amd64
8.4-RELEASE-p28      i386
9.3-RELEASE-p14      amd64
9.3-RELEASE-p14      i386
10.1-RELEASE-p10     amd64
10.1-RELEASE-p10     i386
11.0-CURRENT r282869 amd64
11.0-CURRENT r282869 i386
